title: maharanga stenosiphon
side_effects: Maharanga stenosiphon can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing respiratory problems, including bronchitis and asthma-like symptoms, in individuals with pre-existing lung conditions. Additionally, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts may lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, improper use of Maharanga stenosiphon may also cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and swelling. Furthermore, its improper use may interact with certain medications, leading to adverse effects on the cardiovascular system.
